use_cases: Display monthly vs annual pricing with interactive toggle switch
Compare features across Starter, Pro, and Enterprise tiers
Show different pricing amounts based on billing frequency
Display feature lists with custom checkmark icons for each tier
Support light and dark theme modes for consistent integration
ai_summary: A multi-tiered pricing card component with monthly/annual billing toggle switches and feature comparison lists. Includes custom light/dark checkmark icons and supports both themes. Designed for SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms to display subscription plans with interactive billing options and tier-based feature differentiation.
